heading: Approval of Federal Communications Commission
label: 17705 Approval of Federal Communications Commission
text: A transfer under this chapter does not require the approval of the Federal Communications Commission except to the extent that the approval of the Commission is necessary under .section 17704(3) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1770540:784., , .Pub. L. 90–135, title I, § 20481 Stat. 443Nov. 14, 1967
